summary: Comprehensive testing completed for 'The Becoming' landing page. All backend APIs (14/14 tests pass) and frontend UI features are working correctly. Fixed SignupSubmission model mismatch bug in backend.

passed: Landing page loads with data-testid
Hero section displays with carousel indicators (4 images)
'A Curated Human Experience' text visible in hero
Nav CTA button shows 'Enter The Becoming'
Hero CTA button shows 'Enter The Becoming'
About navigation scrolls to correct section
Experience navigation scrolls to correct section
Journey navigation scrolls to correct section
About section has 3 cards with positive framing
Experience section has pyramid layout with Learning first
'No promises. Only experiences.' tagline present
Journey section has bold 'YOU' styling
FAQ accordion expands on click
FAQ accordion collapses on second click
CTA button opens questionnaire modal
Questionnaire modal has images per slide
Questionnaire has 11 steps with progress indicator
Questionnaire Begin button works
Questionnaire Continue/Back navigation works
Questionnaire contact step requires email, phone, social media
Contact form has name, email, phone, message fields
Contact form submission shows success toast
Footer has large logo (white variant)
Footer has Techbook Technologies badge

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed SignupSubmission model to match stored data schema
test_credentials: None required - all APIs are public
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests (auto-cleaned by prefix 'TEST_')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features implemented as per requirements. Questionnaire has 11 steps (not 18 as previously noted). The thank you message 'A Becoming bud will call you soon!' is implemented in LandingPage.jsx line 247. Contact form requires email*, phone*, and message* fields. Signup API requires name and email, with optional phone, alt_phone, social_media, and questionnaire_data fields.

bug_fixed.issue: GET /api/signups returned 520 error due to SignupSubmission model mismatch
bug_fixed.root_cause: SignupSubmission response model had required fields (why_becoming, current_state, what_seeking) that weren't being stored in database
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated SignupSubmission model to match actual stored fields (alt_phone, social_media instead of why_becoming, current_state, what_seeking)
